acceptance_targets: [chapter_02_booker_01] Pass if the revised closing unit beginning around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:333 contains exactly one completed irreversible action tied to the bargain and leaves the second as future pressure; fail if the same end-of-chapter sequence still includes full on-page intercourse, completed fuel theft/log falsification, and next-night deployment instructions.

[chapter_02_craft_01] Pass if the later shed passage no longer requires Mina to restate in plain language that she wants Tomas to take her to the creek or steal the fuel, and instead introduces a new leverage shift or consequence absent from the earlier counter exchange; fail if both cited beats still hinge on Tomas extracting the same verbal confession of what she wants.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised closing unit beginning around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:333 contains exactly one completed irreversible action tied to the bargain and leaves the second as future pressure; fail if the same end-of-chapter sequence still includes full on-page intercourse, completed fuel theft/log falsification, and next-night deployment instructions.
findings.problem: The closing movement cashes both major irreversible turns at once: Mina and Tomas consummate the bargain on-page, and Tomas immediately falsifies the fuel access that will power the next chapter's illegal run. That leaves this chapter feeling over-resolved and steals escalation from the next nocturnal sequence instead of handing it a fresh cliff of pressure.
findings.rewrite_direction: Reallocate the final turn across snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:333, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:397, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:569, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:575 so this chapter ends on one irreversible bargain step, not both. Either let snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:397 carry the sexual consummation and defer the actual log lie/fueling beyond this chapter, or keep the operational theft here and cut the physical consummation back so the next chapter still owns a larger seduction/complicity escalation.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the later shed passage no longer requires Mina to restate in plain language that she wants Tomas to take her to the creek or steal the fuel, and instead introduces a new leverage shift or consequence absent from the earlier counter exchange; fail if both cited beats still hinge on Tomas extracting the same verbal confession of what she wants.
findings.problem: The bargain's leverage beat is staged twice in near-identical terms. Mina is first forced to name what she wants at the counter, then forced to restate the same creek/fuel desire during sex. Because the second scene repeats the same confession pattern instead of discovering a new cost, the long shed sequence partially replays the negotiation rather than escalating it.
findings.rewrite_direction: Differentiate the pressure functions at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:363, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:377, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:537, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:551. Keep one explicit naming beat, then revise the later passage so it advances through a new consequence already seeded in the chapter: fear of being heard, the ring/Rhea reality, Tomas's class resentment, or the concrete mechanics of the theft. Do not make Mina plainly re-declare the same desire-for-access bargain twice.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the book's uncomfortable overlaps: desire entangled with access, wonder contaminated by biotech history, class need shaping erotic choices, and ecological harm rendered at creature scale. When a scene sits on the edge between restraint and retreat, keep the pressure visible through bodies, residue, changed behavior, or social cost. If an exact detail would make the material more embarrassing, more sensual, or more morally compromising, that is usually the detail to keep.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If sex, ecological damage, class shame, or moral compromise are softened into tasteful fog at the moment they should bite, the scene has failed and must be rewritten at higher specificity.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the norm in spoken dialogue; uncontracted forms should signal deliberate emphasis, institutional performance, or a character-specific formality shift.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate compression and dilation aggressively: single-scene nocturnes, comic paperwork chapters, quiet survey chapters, domestic weather chapters, confrontational set pieces, and aftermath chapters should sit beside each other without repeating the same rhythm two chapters in a row.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete, coastal, and exact without brochure prettiness; scientific and bureaucratic terms may appear when the characters would think or speak through them, but they should stay embodied by consequence.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third centered on Mina Cordero, with free-indirect access tight enough to track bodily desire, shame, and observational obsession without collapsing into confessional summary
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Supple sentence music that can hold humidity, rot, and erotic charge, then cut hard into blunt compression at moments of humiliation, procedural friction, or ecological damage.
